subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having enraptured Thy loved ones with a love for Thy beauty, and for having manifested Thyself unto the pure-hearted in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما شغفت الاحباء حبا بجمالک و تجلیت علی الاصفیاء فی یوم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
